chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 91 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For order on CMA No. 665/18. (Exp) 3. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press the reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
